## Scope

This repository currently treats `docs/**` and `state_api/**` as a frozen Mini App archive. Do not include changes to those paths unless the user explicitly requested restoration of Mini App development.

## Bot checks

- [ ] Telegram bot starts without Worker/D1.
- [ ] First-button user registration still works.
- [ ] Rating remains additive-only.
- [ ] Source Intelligence and Night Observation remain available.
